use_purpose: Use QIF v0.3.0 as a read-only external quality reference while designing the v8.0 external resource governance boundary.
risk_candidates: external reference could be mistaken for semantic truth
decision_candidates: external resources need first-class audit before v8 release sign-off
not_proven: This use record proves only that a bounded read-only external resource was linked to TASK-100; it does not prove QIF correctness, external provider execution, or operator acceptance.
